kill_fact: The catalyst is REAL and STILL LIVE (not fired, not slipped): the Feb 24, 2026 LS&H sale process is confirmed in the company's own 8-K with Morgan Stanley as advisor and explicit 'there can be no assurances that the sale process will result in a transaction' language, and as of June 2026 NO signed SPA / buyer / price exists — process is still in diligence. So the spread is NOT closed and the asymmetry survives, BUT it remains exactly what the bear says: UNDATED, NON-BINDING, SINGLE-BINARY self-help, with a leverage-SOFT (not cash/contract-backed) floor on a -4.0% revenue, ERODING-moat, AI-displacement-exposed base. It earns WATCHLIST/staging conviction, NOT dated-arb conviction.
corrections: (1) SHARE COUNT: bull SoP used ~720M shares; primary proxy/8-K show 642.2M ordinary shares outstanding (record date Mar 16, 2026) — actual count is ~11% LOWER, so per-share equity in every SoP scenario is modestly HIGHER than the bull modeled (favorable but the input was still wrong). (2) FCF: 2025 actual FCF was $365.3M, not ~$400M (the ~$400M is the 2026E midpoint of the $365-435M guide, not actuals). (3) NET DEBT: precise Dec-31-2025 figure is total debt $4,469.9M less cash $329.2M = $4,140.7M net (~4.1x on $1,001.8M Adj EBITDA); Q1 2026 total debt $4,326.8M, cash $242.2M. (4) MATURITY WALL: it is 2028 AND 2029 notes; management states intent to retire the 2028 notes ENTIRELY via FCF before maturity (~$500M of 2029 notes left to refinance), so the 'July 2028 wall' is real but being actively amortized — softer than the bear frames. (5) ACTIVIST LABEL is confirmed FALSE: May 14, 2026 AGM re-elected all 10 directors cleanly, no dissident slate — the catalyst is company-run, not activist-forced.
evidence: Clarivate FY2025 8-K / earnings release (filed Feb 24, 2026), SEC EDGAR accession 000176404626000018: announces active LS&H sale process, Morgan Stanley advisor, 'there can be no assurances that the sale process will result in a transaction'; total debt $4,469.9M, cash $329.2M, 2025 Adj EBITDA $1,001.8M, 2025 FCF $365.3M; LS&H 2025 revenue $389.8M (-6.9% YoY).

Clarivate 8-K reporting 2026 AGM results, SEC EDGAR clvt-20260514 (meeting held May 14, 2026): 642,179,542 ordinary shares outstanding as of record date Mar 16, 2026; all 10 directors re-elected, no dissident slate — confirms NO activist forcing function.

Clarivate Q1 2026 results / 10-Q, SEC EDGAR clvt-20260331 (period ended Mar 31, 2026): LS&H sale 'process is ongoing with no guarantee of the outcome'; total debt $4,326.8M, cash $242.2M; ~4x net leverage targeted to ~2.5x over a few years; intent to retire 2028 notes in full via FCF, ~$500M of 2029 notes to refinance; FY2026 guide revenue $2.30-2.42B, Adj EBITDA $0.98-1.04B, FCF $365-435M.

Clarivate Q1 2026 earnings call transcript (Apr 29, 2026): management reaffirms it is 'actively pursuing the sale of the Life Sciences and Healthcare business as part of a broader portfolio rationalization effort,' multiple parties in diligence, no timeline given — confirms SOFT_EXTENDED (real, advisor-run, undated, non-binding).
